accepted.reason: Small, loop-dominated numeric kernel useful as a compact optimization target.
Sparse coding and dictionary operations with clear nested-loop compute structure.
Contiguous segment scanning logic is self-contained and Cython-conversion friendly.
Index mapping and sparse ternary projection construction are good standalone kernels.

skipped.reason: Interactive/input and visualization-heavy N-queen application code, not a focused compute kernel.
Depends on project-specific likelihood modules and broader HMM stack coupling.
Problem-specific Euler pipeline with external analyze module and global state coupling.
Sage graph-framework generator code with heavy ecosystem dependencies.
Topology/provisioning business logic coupled to networkx and custom project objects.
Domain-specific NN class implementation tied to external parameter module and RL environment.
